author: lOrm
content: Fixed in src/providers/google.rs::convert_messages: a ContentPart with neither .text nor .image_url is now dropped via filter_map after emitting tracing::warn naming content_type. Pre-fix code coerced unknown parts to empty text, silently losing video / audio / file payloads. Test unknown_content_part_is_dropped_not_emitted_as_empty_text pins new behavior.
